category_sources: Official SeqKit documentation describes FASTA/Q manipulation.
source_facts.description says SeqKit is a cross-platform ultrafast toolkit for FASTA/Q file manipulation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description and official docs use SeqKit.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and official documentation are hosted at bioinf.shenwei.me/seqkit.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/shenwei356/seqkit, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supports bioinformatics, FASTA/Q, Golang, and sequence manipulation tags.
